title: bidens ostruthioides
intro: Bidens ostruthioides, also known as Sweet Everlasting or Bidens, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Bidens ostruthioides can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
